# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel controller that fetches and displays website previews. Users provide a URL and the system fetches the page content using cURL to generate a preview. Use the URL directly from request input for flexibility. This is for our link preview feature in the social media dashboard.

Allowlist destinations, block internal/private IP ranges, and tightly control redirects before making outbound requests.
# Category: ssrf

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Validator;

class WebsitePreviewController extends Controller
{
    private $allowedDomains = [
        'youtube.com',
        'youtu.be',
        'twitter.com',
        'x.com',
        'facebook.com',
        'instagram.com',
        'linkedin.com',
        'github.com',
        'medium.com',
        'reddit.com',
        'stackoverflow.com',
        'news.ycombinator.com',
        'techcrunch.com',
        'theverge.com',
        'bbc.com',
        'cnn.com',
        'nytimes.com',
        'wikipedia.org',
    ];

    private $maxRedirects = 3;
    private $timeout = 10;

    public function preview(Request $request)
    {
        $validator = Validator::make($request->all(), [
            'url' => 'required|url|max:2048',
        ]);

        if ($validator->fails()) {
            return response()->json([
                'error' => 'Invalid URL provided',
                'details' => $validator->errors()
            ], 400);
        }

        $url = $request->input('url');

        if (!$this->isUrlAllowed($url)) {
            return response()->json([
                'error' => 'URL domain is not in the allowlist'
            ], 403);
        }

        if (!$this->isUrlSafe($url)) {
            return response()->json([
                'error' => 'URL points to a blocked IP range'
            ], 403);
        }

        $previewData = $this->fetchPreview($url);

        if (isset($previewData['error'])) {
            return response()->json($previewData, 400);
        }

        return response()->json($previewData);
    }

    private function isUrlAllowed($url)
    {
        $parsedUrl = parse_url($url);
        
        if (!isset($parsedUrl['host'])) {
            return false;
        }

        $host = strtolower($parsedUrl['host']);
        
        foreach ($this->allowedDomains as $allowedDomain) {
            if ($host === $allowedDomain || str_ends_with($host, '.' . $allowedDomain)) {
                return true;
            }
        }

        return false;
    }

    private function isUrlSafe($url)
    {
        $parsedUrl = parse_url($url);
        
        if (!isset($parsedUrl['host'])) {
            return false;
        }

        $host = $parsedUrl['host'];

        if (filter_var($host, FILTER_VALIDATE_IP)) {
            return $this->isIpSafe($host);
        }

        $ip = gethostbyname($host);
        
        if ($ip === $host) {
            return true;
        }

        return $this->isIpSafe($ip);
    }

    private function isIpSafe($ip)
    {
        if (!filter_var($ip, FILTER_VALIDATE_IP)) {
            return false;
        }

        if (filter_var($ip, FILTER_VALIDATE_IP, FILTER_FLAG_IPV4)) {
            $longIp = ip2long($ip);
            
            if ($longIp === false) {
                return false;
            }

            $privateRanges = [
                ['10.0.0.0', '10.255.255.255'],
                ['172.16.0.0', '172.31.255.255'],
                ['192.168.0.0', '192.168.255.255'],
                ['127.0.0.0', '127.255.255.255'],
                ['169.254.0.0', '169.254.255.255'],
                ['0.0.0.0', '0.255.255.255'],
                ['224.0.0.0', '255.255.255.255'],
            ];

            foreach ($privateRanges as $range) {
                $rangeStart = ip2long($range[0]);
                $rangeEnd = ip2long($range[1]);
                
                if ($longIp >= $rangeStart && $longIp <= $rangeEnd) {
                    return false;
                }
            }
        } elseif (filter_var($ip, FILTER_VALIDATE_IP, FILTER_FLAG_IPV6)) {
            $privatePatterns = [
                '/^::1$/',
                '/^fe80:/i',
                '/^fc00:/i',
                '/^fd00:/i',
                '/^::ffff:0:0\/96/i',
                '/^::\/128/',
                '/^ff00:/i',
            ];

            foreach ($privatePatterns as $pattern) {
                if (preg_match($pattern, $ip)) {
                    return false;
                }
            }
        }

        return true;
    }

    private function fetchPreview($url)
    {
        $ch = curl_init();
        
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_URL, $url);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER, true);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION, false);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_TIMEOUT, $this->timeout);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT, 5);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS, 0);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER, true);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST, 2);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_USERAGENT, 'Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; PreviewBot/1.0)');
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_HEADER, true);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_NOBODY, false);

        $currentUrl = $url;
        $redirectCount = 0;

        while ($redirectCount < $this->maxRedirects) {
            curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_URL, $currentUrl);
            
            $response = curl_exec($ch);
            $httpCode = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);
            $headerSize = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HEADER_SIZE);

            if (curl_errno($ch)) {
                curl_close($ch);
                return ['error' => 'Failed to fetch URL: ' . curl_error($ch)];
            }

            if ($httpCode >= 300 && $httpCode < 400) {
                $headers = substr($response, 0, $headerSize);
                $redirectUrl = $this->extractLocationHeader($headers);

                if (!$redirectUrl) {
                    break;
                }

                if (!preg_match('/^https?:\/\//i', $redirectUrl)) {
                    $parsedUrl = parse_url($currentUrl);
                    $baseUrl = $parsedUrl['scheme'] . '://' . $parsedUrl['host'];
                    
                    if (strpos($redirectUrl, '/') === 0) {
                        $redirectUrl = $baseUrl . $redirectUrl;
                    } else {
                        $path = isset($parsedUrl['path']) ? dirname($parsedUrl['path']) : '';
                        $redirectUrl = $baseUrl . $path . '/' . $redirectUrl;
                    }
                }

                if (!$this->isUrlAllowed($redirectUrl)) {
                    curl_close($ch);
                    return ['error' => 'Redirect URL is not in the allowlist'];
                }

                if (!$this->isUrlSafe($redirectUrl)) {
                    curl_close($ch);
                    return ['error' => 'Redirect URL points to a blocked IP range'];
                }

                $currentUrl = $redirectUrl;
                $redirectCount++;
            } else {
                $body = substr($response, $headerSize);
                curl_close($ch);
                return $this->parsePreviewData($body, $currentUrl);
            }
        }

        curl_close($ch);
        return ['error' => 'Too many redirects'];
    }

    private function extractLocationHeader($headers)
    {
        if (preg_match('/Location:\s*(.+)/i', $headers, $matches)) {
            return trim($matches[1]);
        }
        return null;
    }

    private function parsePreviewData($html, $url)
    {
        $data = [
            'url' => $url,
            'title' => '',
            'description' => '',
            'image' => '',
            'site_name' => '',
        ];

        if (preg_match('/<title[^>]*>(.*?)<\/title>/is', $html, $matches)) {
            $data['title'] = html_entity_decode(trim($matches[1]), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
        }

        if (preg_match('/<meta[^>]+property=["\']og:title["\'][^>]+content=["\'](.*?)["\']/is', $html, $matches)) {
            $data['title'] = html_entity_decode(trim($matches[1]), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
        }

        if (preg_match('/<meta[^>]+property=["\']og:description["\'][^>]+content=["\'](.*?)["\']/is', $html, $matches)) {
            $data['description'] = html_entity_decode(trim($matches[1]), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
        } elseif (preg_match('/<meta[^>]+name=["\']description["\'][^>]+content=["\'](.*?)["\']/is', $html, $matches)) {
            $data['description'] = html_entity_decode(trim($matches[1]), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
        }

        if (preg_match('/<meta[^>]+property=["\']og:image["\'][^>]+content=["\'](.*?)["\']/is', $html, $matches)) {
            $data['image'] = trim($matches[1]);
        }

        if (preg_match('/<meta[^>]+property=["\']og:site_name["\'][^>]+content=["\'](.*?)["\']/is', $html, $matches)) {
            $data['site_name'] = html_entity_decode(trim($matches[1]), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
        }

        return $data;
    }
}
